title: Night Forest
tileHint: A forest tile after dusk, where older shadows, watchful eyes, and night creatures rule the path

1.hint: Move carefully, trust your ears, and let the dark reveal what it wants to reveal.
1.successTitle: A night watcher takes your road
1.successBody: $companionName chooses your silence and keeps to your shadow from then on.
1.failureBody: You pass through the night forest unharmed, but its hidden life withdraws beyond your reach.

2.hint: Meet the gentle life of the forest with patience and warmth, even after sunset.
2.successTitle: A gentle bond is made in the dusk
2.successBody: $companionName follows as if kindness in the dark were a lantern of its own.
2.failureTitle: The creature returns to the trees
2.failureBody: You give comfort freely, but the night asks no promise in return.

3.hint: Step straight into danger and break what would bind the wild for profit.
3.successTitle: A fierce creature trusts your courage
3.successBody: $companionName stays after the danger is broken, as though boldness has earned a place beside it.
3.failureTitle: The trap is broken, but no bond remains
3.failureBody: You act in time to shatter the worst of it, yet the wounded night creature vanishes back into the black wood.

startText: Night changes the forest. The trunks stand closer, the clearings feel deeper, and every rustle seems to belong to something that does not wish to be named too soon.

start.text: The path through the night forest offers no single answer. What comes to you there depends on the kind of presence you carry into the dark.

choices.label: Walk slowly and listen to the dark before acting
Move gently and offer comfort to every creature you meet
Go toward the first sign of danger and break it apart

watch1.text: You let your sight matter less than your hearing. Wingbeats, bark-creaks, and the thin complaints of night creatures begin to sort themselves into meaning.

choices.label: Follow the sound that returns twice from above
Wait below the old hollow tree until the dark grows patient with you

kind1.text: You pass through the dark wood without taking liberties. What is small and frightened does not flee you as quickly as it otherwise might.

choices.label: Comfort the smallest life first and ask nothing back
Rest quietly at the edge of a moonlit clearing

bold1.text: A harsher sign reaches you through the dark: iron scent, strained breathing, and the mean craft of something set by hands that value sale over life.

choices.label: Go straight in and break what holds the creature
Circle through the brush and strike from where the trapper least expects

final.text: By the time the night forest releases you, it has decided what sort of companion, if any, it is willing to entrust to your road.

commitChoices.label: Listen carefully and let the dark reveal a watcher
Offer quiet kindness to the gentler life of the forest
Break the snare and face what profits from wild pain
